summary: iter252 Purchasing Approvals + Daily AI Briefing testing complete. 14/14 backend tests pass. All frontend components verified working: UserAvatarMenu with profile switcher, notification bell, briefing button, ApprovalBanner, PurchasingApprovals panel (3 tabs), mobile standup with AI briefing. Tile/Cascade buttons confirmed removed.
critical_code_review_comments: Purchasing approval chain logic correctly walks hierarchy: sous-chef($2k) → exec-chef($10k) → fb-director($15k) → gm($20k) → director($25k) → admin(unlimited)
Wrong approver correctly returns 403 with descriptive error message
Auto-approval works when request is within requester's own limit
Rejection correctly stores rejection_reason in database
Banner endpoint correctly scopes pending approvals to user's role
Standup-feed endpoint returns bullets + narrative from Claude
UserAvatarMenu z-index (2147483000) correctly wins over other elements
ApprovalBanner polls every 45s and dispatches open-panel CustomEvent
Tile/Cascade buttons (PanelLayoutToolbar) confirmed removed from DOM
test_credentials: Admin: admin@luccca.com / LuccaaAdmin2026! ; devAuth=1 query param for bypass
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created test approval requests (prefixed with test data) - these are cleaned up by subsequent test runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter252 fully tested: (1) /api/approvals/limits returns 14 roles with correct default limits (sous-chef=2000, exec-chef=10000, director=25000, admin=10M). (2) /api/approvals/requests POST correctly routes based on amount vs role limits. (3) Approval chain walks correctly - $4500 from sous-chef goes to exec-chef, $18000 goes to GM. (4) Wrong approver gets 403. (5) Rejection stores reason. (6) Banner scopes to user role. (7) /api/briefing/standup-feed returns Claude-generated bullets+narrative. (8) Frontend: UserAvatarMenu visible at top-right with avatar, notifications, briefing buttons. (9) Avatar dropdown shows 16 switch-profile buttons. (10) Briefing modal opens and shows Claude narrative. (11) ApprovalBanner shows pending approvals with REVIEW button. (12) PurchasingApprovals panel has 3 tabs: Pending (with approve/reject), My Requests (with new request form), Onboarding Controls (14 role rows with edit). (13) Mobile /m/ecw standup shows AI briefing card with bullets and expandable narrative. (14) Tile/Cascade buttons confirmed removed.
